capabilities.name: plugin-json-schema
capabilities.description: Knows plugin.json fields: name, description, version, author (name/url), repository, homepage, license, keywords

capabilities.name: marketplace-json-schema
capabilities.description: Knows marketplace.json structure: $schema, name, owner, metadata, plugins array with source field and category

capabilities.name: skill-frontmatter-fields
capabilities.description: Knows SKILL.md YAML frontmatter fields: name, description, user-invocable, argument-hint, context (fork/inline), agent, allowed-tools

capabilities.name: skill-agent-spawning
capabilities.description: Understands how skills spawn agents: context: fork creates isolated conversation, agent field references plugin:agent-name, $ARGUMENTS substitution in prompt template

capabilities.name: optimizer-six-step-workflow
capabilities.description: Knows the 6-step optimizer workflow: detect runner, verify setup, verify install, parse prompt, run codeflash, report results

capabilities.name: optimizer-cli-flags
capabilities.description: Knows codeflash CLI flags: --worktree (always used), --file, --function, --all, --no-pr, --effort, and the 10-minute timeout

capabilities.name: hook-event-and-structure
capabilities.description: Knows UserPromptSubmit event fires on each prompt, hooks.json structure with event keys, hook groups, type: command, ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, timeout in seconds

capabilities.name: suggest-script-lifecycle
capabilities.description: Knows suggest-optimize.sh flow: HEAD tracking, duplicate check, Python diff detection, config check, runner detection, jq JSON output with <user-prompt-submit-hook> tags
